system.message:
"A scheduled task was created.

Subject:
	Security ID:		S-1-5-21-1936990016-347023981-4024709258-1001
	Account Name:		username
	Account Domain:		hostname
	Logon ID:		0x2E87F9

Task Information:
	Task Name: 		\atk_boot
	Task Content: 		<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-16"?>
<Task version="1.2" xmlns="http://schemas.microsoft.com/windows/2004/02/mit/task">
  <RegistrationInfo>
    <Date>2026-07-11T09:07:32</Date>
    <Author>hostname\username</Author>
    <URI>\atk_boot</URI>
  </RegistrationInfo>
  <Triggers>
    <BootTrigger>
      <StartBoundary>2026-07-11T09:07:00</StartBoundary>
      <Enabled>true</Enabled>
    </BootTrigger>
  </Triggers>
  <Settings>
    <MultipleInstancesPolicy>IgnoreNew</MultipleInstancesPolicy>
    <DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>true</DisallowStartIfOnBatteries>
    <StopIfGoingOnBatteries>true</StopIfGoingOnBatteries>
    <AllowHardTerminate>true</AllowHardTerminate>
    <StartWhenAvailable>false</StartWhenAvailable>
    <RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>false</RunOnlyIfNetworkAvailable>
    <IdleSettings>
      <Duration>PT10M</Duration>
      <WaitTimeout>PT1H</WaitTimeout>
      <StopOnIdleEnd>true</StopOnIdleEnd>
      <RestartOnIdle>false</RestartOnIdle>
    </IdleSettings>
    <AllowStartOnDemand>true</AllowStartOnDemand>
    <Enabled>true</Enabled>
    <Hidden>false</Hidden>
    <RunOnlyIfIdle>false</RunOnlyIfIdle>
    <WakeToRun>false</WakeToRun>
    <ExecutionTimeLimit>PT72H</ExecutionTimeLimit>
    <Priority>7</Priority>
  </Settings>
  <Actions Context="Author">
    <Exec>
      <Command>C:\Windows\System32\calc.exe</Command>
    </Exec>
  </Actions>
  <Principals>
    <Principal id="Author">
      <UserId>S-1-5-18</UserId>
      <RunLevel>LeastPrivilege</RunLevel>
    </Principal>
  </Principals>
</Task>

Other Information:

	ClientProcessId: 			5460
	ParentProcessId: 			2888
	FQDN: 		0
